title: Delicate Tunisian Lettuce Salad
description: A light and festive Tunisian salad made with little gem lettuce, herbs, and a hint of Middle Eastern spices.
instructions: Rinse the little gem lettuce heads and pat them dry with paper towels.
Trim the ends of the lettuce leaves and separate them into individual leaves.
In a small bowl, mix together the namul-blanch seasoning, parsley, mint, and chervil leaves.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the olive oil and lemon juice.
Add the salt and pepper to the oil and lemon juice mixture and whisk until combined.
Add the lettuce leaves to the bowl with the oil and lemon juice mixture and toss to coat.
Divide the lettuce mixture among 4-6 individual mini cocottes.
Spoon the herb mixture over the lettuce leaves in each cocotte.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
